textByHashes.5d27dbf48590de56e6639ec629835a6b1fe7322a: I'm tending to these farming patches. They need a little more work before I can plant anything.
textByHashes.927228c8d25cb4a859fc1ddecbe1b816f6e9c16e: The centre patch is full of weeds, and as soon as I clear them they grow back. The south patch is always far too dry. And the soil in the north patch is terrible; it needs a good dose of compost.
textByHashes.d5c19213c07117375b2eb2714d24c0e753f1a7bf: Kingdom? Etceteria is ruled by a Queen and we don't approve of you.
textByHashes.48abd6fcf17406e2383d9bdc7a55013728b7b008: Don't trouble yourself further, Your Highness, you've already done so much!
textByHashes.f7b75f5870b4f41f142fd05329ccd51cdca06a65: Hey! This is the Queen's farm. You'll need her approval to make use of it.
textByHashes.92518e68f3984d295c8a98142eefc6629abb88fd: The storerooms are full, your Highness. You should talk to Advisor Ghrim to collect what we've gathered for you.
